message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_10-10-59_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "should read JSON from stdin and write a results JSON to stdout"
Expected behavior: spawning `node --import tsx src/cli.ts` (or similar) with JSON on stdin should write `{"results":[...]}` JSON to stdout.
Current error: SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input (empty CLI stub).
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_10-10-59_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/cli.ts

Implement the minimal CLI: read all of stdin synchronously, parse it as JSON, pass to `runScenario` from "./claim-office.js", JSON.stringify the result, and write to stdout. Keep it tiny.

Example minimal implementation:
```typescript
import { runScenario } from "./claim-office.js";
import { readFileSync } from "node:fs";
const input = JSON.parse(readFileSync(0, "utf-8"));
process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(runScenario(input)));
```

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal CLI to make the failing test pass.
